rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Release Property From Mechanic'S Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 14, 2024 line 1. PETITIONER VIRGINIA JONES Notice Of Motion And Motion To Release Property From Mechanic'S Lien is OFF CALENDAR. No proof of service on file. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: HONG ZHENG ET AL VS. ST. FRANCIS HOMES ASSOCIATION, A NON-PROFIT MUTUAL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of St. Francis Home Associations' Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 14, 2024 line 4. DEFENDANT ST. FRANCIS HOMES ASSOCIATION, A NON-PROFIT MUTUAL BENEFIT CORPORATION Notice Of St. Francis Home Associations' Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Hearing Required. No later than 8:30 a.m. on on November 4, 2024 (1) Defendant to file and serve a supplemental declaration addressing how and when Defendant's counsel responded to Plaintiff's July 10, 2024 e-mail re: conditions to set aside default and explain the delay in filing this motion between July 10, 2024 and October 11, 2024; (2) Plaintiff to file and serve a supplemental declaration addressing the time and tasks for which attorney's fees are sought and providing citation to authority (no argument) allowing for attorney's fees incurred in opposing the motion to vacate. Declarations shall be limited to 2 pages. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
